questions.text: What causes a mirage in deserts?
questions.expected_answer: It is an optical illusion caused by total internal reflection of light in layers of air of varying density due to temperature differences.

questions.text: State Huygens' principle.
questions.expected_answer: Every point on a wavefront acts as a secondary source of spherical wavelets, and the new wavefront is the forward envelope of these wavelets.

questions.text: What is meant by the interference of light?
questions.expected_answer: The phenomenon of redistribution of light energy due to the superposition of light waves from two coherent sources.

questions.text: Distinguish between diffraction and interference.
questions.expected_answer: Interference is due to superposition of waves from two coherent sources, whereas diffraction is due to superposition of wavelets from different parts of the same wavefront.
